name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent customer payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide credit risk monitoring instead of manual credit assessments and ad-hoc payment reminders.
problem_solved: Inconsistent customer payments leading to cash flow issues.
features: Delinquency alert system for collections teams

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent customer payments leading to cash flow issues.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent customer payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide credit risk monitoring instead of manual credit assessments and ad-hoc payment reminders.

must_have_features: Delinquency alert system for collections teams
